title: Maintain two-layer architecture
summary: GitHub Pages remains the public monitoring layer; private prompts, configuration and controls remain protected.

title: Protect Prompt and Grok studios
summary: The Prompt and Grok repositories are private. Prompt2 remains the public-safe prompt intelligence edition in the public portal.

title: Adopt Runtime Reliability v2
summary: Merge prompt ablation, TDD governance, trace replay, atomic agents, explicit escalation and checkpoint recovery while preserving the public/private boundary.

title: Adopt one-request AIOS evolution workflow
summary: A material AIOS idea can be analysed, improved, documented, backed up and prepared for governed implementation in one authorised request while retaining human approval and rollback controls.

title: Adopt persistent amendment discussion registry
summary: Daily high-value recommendations are promoted into a persistent watchlist, amendment registry and discussion queue before any future merge decision.

title: Adopt Cloudflare Access with Google OAuth
summary: Private AIOS portals use Cloudflare Access and approved Google identities. AIOS does not create or store usernames, passwords or self-registration records. Cloudflare account-side configuration remains required before production protection is active.

title: Remove paid password-manager dependency
summary: AIOS does not require 1Password or another paid password manager at the current stage. Runtime secrets use Cloudflare encrypted secrets; CI/CD secrets use GitHub Actions Secrets; repositories contain metadata only.
